raw:
## Completed
Implemented the Foreman live status panel and session-aware dashboard ownership updates.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/dashboard/reader.ts` - enriched status model with live transcript-derived action/tool/context/elapsed fields, added `formatStatusPanel()`, elapsed formatting, and `sortForPicker()`.
- `extensions/foreman/dashboard/view.ts` - added session ownership badges, mine-only filter, attention/ownership picker sort, root owner badge, and live agent header details.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - replaced footer `setStatus()` with `setWidget(..., { placement: "aboveEditor" })`, kept direct-mode status untouched, threaded session id into dashboard.
- `extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh` - extended headless tests for enrichment, panel formatting, session scoping, done collapse, spinner, and picker sorting.

## How To Verify
`bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh`

## Notes
Recon anchors: reader model/statusline at `extensions/foreman/dashboard/reader.ts:289`, `:318`, `:520`, `:723`; dashboard views at `extensions/foreman/dashboard/view.ts:471`, `:500`, `:531`; shortcut/status wiring at `extensions/foreman/index.ts:979`, `:994`, `:1086`; Phase C spec at `extensions/foreman/docs/DASHBOARD-SPEC.md:183`.

Also ran the stricter per-round gate command successfully.

## MACHINE BLOCK (MANDATORY — end your response with this exact block)
